cmd:
if [ -z "$N8N_API_KEY" ] || [ -z "$GITHUB_TOKEN" ]; then echo MISSING; exit 0; fi
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,urllib.request,urllib.error,base64,os,time
tok=os.environ["GITHUB_TOKEN"]; key=os.environ["N8N_API_KEY"]
base="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud"; apib=base+"/api/v1"; WID="mVC0K0ymEiB6DuiT"
def req(url,data=None,method="GET",hdr=None,to=40):
    h={"User-Agent":"vps"}; h.update(hdr or {})
    return urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(url,data=data,method=method,headers=h),timeout=to)
# 1) PUT final main workflow
gh="https://api.github.com/repos/irynakarmazina-bot/Iryna_Karmazina/contents/n8n/cmr-draft/CMR_draft_workflow.json?ref=claude/n8n-cmr-draft-automation-8tdhbk"
wf=json.loads(base64.b64decode(json.load(req(gh,hdr={"Authorization":"token "+tok,"Accept":"application/vnd.github.v3+json"}))["content"]).decode())
body={k:wf[k] for k in ("name","nodes","connections","settings") if k in wf}
r=req(apib+"/workflows/"+WID,data=json.dumps(body).encode(),method="PUT",hdr={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key,"Content-Type":"application/json"})
print("UPDATED main active="+str(json.load(r).get("active")))
# 2) cleanup temp workflow: delete test doc + orphan raw
cln={"name":"TEMP cleanup","nodes":[
 {"parameters":{"httpMethod":"POST","path":"cmr-cln","responseMode":"responseNode","options":{}},"id":"w","name":"Webhook","type":"n8n-nodes-base.webhook","typeVersion":2,"position":[200,300]},
 {"parameters":{"method":"DELETE","url":"https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/1kSalUAU9vmkcPae5jAKdYrn_cksNowa0C4LbOk1OB9Y?supportsAllDrives=true","authentication":"predefinedCredentialType","nodeCredentialType":"googleDriveOAuth2Api","options":{"response":{"response":{"neverError":True}}}},"id":"d1","name":"del1","type":"n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest","typeVersion":4.2,"position":[420,300],"credentials":{"googleDriveOAuth2Api":{"id":"2GWpYd58b4gHSUPi","name":"Google Drive account"}}},
 {"parameters":{"method":"DELETE","url":"https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/1DSZYsim9Sd-JE203lnRq0kBoJZ4hs7u6?supportsAllDrives=true","authentication":"predefinedCredentialType","nodeCredentialType":"googleDriveOAuth2Api","options":{"response":{"response":{"neverError":True}}}},"id":"d2","name":"del2","type":"n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest","typeVersion":4.2,"position":[640,300],"credentials":{"googleDriveOAuth2Api":{"id":"2GWpYd58b4gHSUPi","name":"Google Drive account"}}},
 {"parameters":{"respondWith":"json","responseBody":"={{ JSON.stringify({ok:true}) }}","options":{}},"id":"r","name":"Respond","type":"n8n-nodes-base.respondToWebhook","typeVersion":1,"position":[860,300]}],
 "connections":{"Webhook":{"main":[[{"node":"del1","type":"main","index":0}]]},"del1":{"main":[[{"node":"del2","type":"main","index":0}]]},"del2":{"main":[[{"node":"Respond","type":"main","index":0}]]}},"settings":{"executionOrder":"v1"}}
cid=json.load(req(apib+"/workflows",data=json.dumps(cln).encode(),method="POST",hdr={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key,"Content-Type":"application/json"}))["id"]
req(apib+"/workflows/"+cid+"/activate",data=json.dumps({}).encode(),method="POST",hdr={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key,"Content-Type":"application/json"})
time.sleep(4)
try:
    r=req(base+"/webhook/cmr-cln",data=b"{}",method="POST",hdr={"Content-Type":"application/json"},to=40); print("CLEANUP",r.read().decode()[:100])
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e: print("cln_err",e.code)
req(apib+"/workflows/"+cid,method="DELETE",hdr={"X-N8N-API-KEY":key}); print("cleanup_wf_deleted")
PY
